info.english_meaning: to bear to tolerate to be powerful to be satisfied
info.hindI_arTa: sahanA sahana karanA SaktimAna honA saMtuzwa honA

upasarga_meanings.meaning: utsAhita honA udyoga karanA yatna karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ASIrBirbfhitAnasmAnna pApaM prasahizyati' (BA॰Adi॰143.16) prasahizyati=prasahizyate=aBiBavizyati=aDikarizyate
'saMyuge sAMyugInaM tamudyataM prasaheta kaH' (ku॰2.57)
'hriyamARAvakASaM tu dAnaprItyA punaH punaH na prasehe manastasya cCedaduHKaM vigAhitum' (avadA॰jA॰8.44) iha praSabdo'narTakaH
'prasahya vittAharaRaM na kalkaH' (BA॰Adi॰1.275) prasahya=prakarzeRa duHKaM soQvetyarTaH
'prasahya Darzitastatra somo vE rAjayakzmaRA' (hari॰1.25.47) prasahya=balAt=haWAt
'prasahya siMhaH kila tAM cakarza' (raGu॰2.27) ukto'rTaH 'prasahanamaBiBava ityaDeH prasahane' (pA॰1.3.33) sUtre vfttiH
'vizAdo yaM prasahate vikrame samupasTite' (rA0 46410) prasahate'BiBavati yo vizAdaM prasahata iti pAWAntaram tannAdeyamanizwArTagateH
'kAkakaNkakuraracAzaBAsaSaSaGAtyulUkacilliSyenagfDrapraBftayaH prasahAH' (suSruta0 sU0 4672) prasahya BakzayantIti prasahAH
'na mAninI saMsahate'nyasaNgamam' (Bawwi0 26) atra samityanarTakaSCandonuroDAdASritaH
'aye virama niHsahAsi jAtA' (mAlatI0 3) niHsahA=SrAntA glAnA
'dIrGakAlaM himavati gaNgAyASca durutsahAm mUrDnA DArAM mahAdevaH SirasA yAmaDArayat' (BA0 anu0 10327).. durutsahA=duHsahA nArTa udA
'sA durvAraM kaTamapi parityAgaduHKaM vizehe' (raGu0 1487) vizehe=sehe viSabda iha viSezakfnna
'tasyAmeva raGoH pARqyAH pratApaM na vizehire' (raGu0 449)
'sImAyAmavizahyAyAM svayaM rAjEva Darmavit pradiSed BUmim…' (manu0 8265).. avizahyAyAm paricCettumaSakyAyAm
'kiM nAma lokezu vizahyamasya kfzRasya sarvezu sadevakezu' (BA0 vana0 12017) vizahyam=asahyam viSabdo naYarTe
'pitfByaScodakadAnaM yaTotsAham' (gO0 Da0 155) yaTotsAhaM yaTASakti
'tavAnuvfttiM na ca kartumutsahe' (ku0 265) notsahe na DfzRomi nAlamasmi
'ajYavannotsaheTAstvam' (Bawwi0 1916) ajYavanmA'vasada ityAha SabdamaryAdayA tu nAyamarTaH sulaBaH
'kzaRamapyutsahate na mAM vinA' (ku0 436) notsahate=nirvftiM na laBate
'mandotsAhaH kftosmi mfgayApavAdinA mAQavyena' (SA0 2) utsAho'BilAza Otsukyam
'mamotsAhaBaNgaM mA kfTAH' (hita0 3) utsAhaH kriyAsAmarTyam
'yadyetAvatIM dakziRAM notsaheta' (satyA0 SrO0 23245) dAtumiti SezaH notsaheta na SaknuyAt
